params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, if you would put one or more +1/+1 counters on a creature you control, put that many plus one +1/+1 counters on it instead.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, if you would put one or more +1/+1 counters on a creature you control, put that many plus one +1/+1 counters on it instead.

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your end step, if you haven't cast a spell from your hand this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME.
